text_block_list.name: Mejiro Dober
text_block_list.text: I've done everything I can... This race is mine!

text_block_list.name: Mejiro Dober
text_block_list.text:
O-of course I am! How am I supposed to win if I
don't focus?

text_block_list.name: Mejiro Dober
text_block_list.text: Yeah... We worked so hard together for this day.

text_block_list.name: Mejiro Dober
text_block_list.text:
...I'll run my best. I'm not afraid of the crowd, or
the competition!

text_block_list.name: Mejiro Dober
text_block_list.text:
...I'll run my best. I'm not afraid of the crowd, or
the competition!
